summary: Testing iteration 21 - Generate mode. Tested QuickReferenceTab with real D&D 5e SRD data from backend API. All features working correctly: Items section (3000+ local items), Spells section (319 spells from /api/srd/spells), Classes section (12 classes from /api/srd/classes), Races section (9 races from /api/srd/races), Rules section with DC, Conditions, Cover. Search and filters work on all sections. Click-to-expand shows full descriptions.
